# QA Plan: Sprint 8 (Chest + Relic MVP Framework)
**Date**: 2026-05-11
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 20 stories — 12 must-have / 5 should-have / 3 nice-to-have
**Engine**: Roblox (Luau, --!strict)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-8.md`
**Sprint window**: 2026-05-12 → 2026-05-25

> Sprint 7 retrospective lesson informing this plan: every Logic story needs its
> unit test file at the declared path before /story-done can mark it Complete.
> 4-caller CSM Authority + Phase ordering (ADR-0002/ADR-0004) drove the BUG-001
> regression class — Sprint 8 has 4 stories touching these contracts (8-5, 8-9,
> 8-10, 8-12). Test them at the boundary, not just at the function.

## Automated Tests Required

### 8-1 Chest story-001 — spawn from CollectionService tag + ProximityPrompt [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/chest-system/spawn_component_prompt.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- `ChestSystem.createAll()` scans Workspace for `ChestT1` / `ChestT2` / `ChestT3` tag descendants and attaches `ChestComponent` to each (ComponentCreator ANATOMY §9 pattern)
- T1 + T2 spawn ProximityPrompt children with correct `HoldDuration`, `ActionText`, `ObjectText` from `ChestSpec` registry
- T3 silently skipped MVP (registry slot present, prompt not attached)
- 9-prompt instance cap respected (6 T1 + 3 T2 max). 10th tagged Part → warn + skip
- `ChestComponent` exposes `:destroy()` that disconnects + reparents prompt + removes component

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero tagged Parts in Workspace → `createAll` no-ops without error
- Untagged Part child of a tagged Model → not attached (CollectionService scope)
- Tagged Part destroyed mid-round → ChestComponent destroy fires via Instance.Destroying

**Estimated test count**: ~6 it() blocks

---

### 8-2 Chest story-002 — RemoteValidator 4-Check guard pipeline [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/chest-system/guard_pipeline.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- Stage 1 Identity — non-Instance / non-Player rejected silently (no side-effects observable)
- Stage 2 State — MatchState != Active rejected (GraceWindow + Eliminated + Intermission + Countdown all blocked per chest GDD §C 2026-04-24 amendment)
- Stage 3 Parameters — payload missing `chestId` or `tier` → reject; extra fields → reject (whitelist semantics per ADR-0010)
- Stage 4 Rate — token-bucket via RateLimitConfig.ChestPromptTrigger; 3rd trigger within burst window → reject
- Stage 5 Distance — opener farther than `CHEST_PROMPT_DISTANCE` from chest Part → reject
- Stage 6 Player crowd state — `csm.get(crowdId).state != "Active"` → reject (GraceWindow guard)
- First-failure short-circuit — no subsequent stage evaluated; verified by counting handler invocations

**Edge cases to cover**:
- All 6 stages pass on happy path → claim proceeds
- Each stage in isolation produces silent reject (no error, no log spam at ERROR level)
- Player UserId spoofed via payload (per BUG-001 negative UserId fix line of defense) → identity check rejects

**Estimated test count**: ~12 it() blocks

---

### 8-3 Chest story-003 — open exclusivity 2D distance + UserId tiebreak [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/chest-system/open_exclusivity.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- Two players trigger same chest same frame; both pass guards 1-6 → only nearer (by 2D squared XZ distance) claims
- Equal distance → lower UserId wins
- Loser's prompt rejection is silent (no error, no client-side notification leak)
- One chest per player per round invariant — second chest claim attempt rejected by `_playerOpenedThisRound` set
- 2D distance ignores Y (vertical offset does not change winner)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- 3-way tie at identical position → lowest UserId only
- Player A on a platform 50 studs above chest, Player B at chest level — Y ignored, distance equal in XZ wins
- Same player triggers two chests same frame — first registered wins, second rejected via `_playerOpenedThisRound`

**Estimated test count**: ~6 it() blocks

---

### 8-4 Chest story-004 — F1 base_toll_scaled formula [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/chest-system/f1_base_toll.spec.luau`

**Formula** (from chest GDD §F1 Batch 5 resolution 2026-04-24):
```
base_toll_scaled(tier, count) = max(T_FLAT[tier], ceil(count × T_PCT[tier]))
```

**What to test**:
- T1: count=10 → max(T1_TOLL=3, ceil(10×0.08)=1) = 3 (FLAT floor wins)
- T1: count=100 → max(3, ceil(100×0.08)=8) = 8 (PCT wins)
- T1: count=300 → max(3, ceil(300×0.08)=24) = 24
- T2: count=10 → max(T2_TOLL=10, ceil(10×0.20)=2) = 10
- T2: count=100 → max(10, 20) = 20
- T2: count=300 → max(10, 60) = 60
- T3: count=300 → flat 120 (per registry T3_TOLL=120, T3_TOLL_PCT=0)
- count=1 (minimum) → FLAT wins all tiers
- count=300 (CSM clamp max) → PCT scales for T1/T2 (T3 flat)
- ceil rounds up: count=11 T1 → ceil(11×0.08)=ceil(0.88)=1 → FLAT 3 wins

**Edge cases to cover**:
- count value outside [1, 300] — pre-CSM-clamp not expected; if it occurs, formula must not divide-by-zero or return negative
- T_PCT=0 (T3 case) — formula reduces to T_FLAT

**Estimated test count**: ~10 it() blocks (one per row in F1 table + boundary)

---

### 8-5 Chest story-006 — atomic claim Phase 4 [Logic + Integration]

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/chest-system/atomic_claim_phase4.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- ChestSystem registers Phase 4 callback (after CCR Phase 1 / Relic Phase 2 / Absorb Phase 3) via TickOrch _registerPhases boot wiring
- `csm.updateCount(crowdId, -effectiveToll, "Chest")` fires exactly once per atomic claim
- Same Phase 4 callback writes chest state `Available → Claimed` immediately after CSM updateCount (synchronous; no yield gap observable to subsequent phases)
- `ChestPeelOff` RemoteEvent fires to opener only — verified via fanout spy
- Multi-claim same tick — two passing claims on different chests → both deduct + both transition state same tick
- Multi-claim same chest same tick — Story 003 exclusivity resolves first → only one updateCount + one ChestPeelOff
- 4-caller invariant: only ChestSystem appears as "Chest" deltaSource on CSM updateCount log (verify via CSM fanout spy)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Opener's crowd in GraceWindow at claim time — guard already rejects in Story 002 (this test isolates Phase 4 doesn't re-check; trusts guard)
- Crowd eliminated between claim trigger and Phase 4 dispatch — claim rejected by `_pendingClaims` post-filter
- updateCount returns clamped value (e.g., count=10, toll=15 → clamp to 1) — chest still transitions Available→Claimed (not gated on full deduction)

**Estimated test count**: ~8 it() blocks

*Boundary-class test — covers ADR-0002 Phase 4 + ADR-0004 CSM Authority + ADR-0001 reliable RemoteEvent. Same class as BUG-001 root cause. Test at the integration boundary, not just at the function.*

---

### 8-6 Chest story-009 — destroyAll cleanup [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/chest-system/destroyall_cleanup.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- `RoundLifecycle.destroyAll()` invokes `ChestSystem.destroyAll()` (verified via destruction order trace)
- DraftOpen state chests auto-pick FIRST candidate before destroy — `RelicSystem.grant` fires per chest, `CrowdRelicChanged` broadcasts
- All chests transition to Dormant
- All `_respawnTimers` cancelled (no stray Heartbeat connection leaks)
- All ProximityPrompt + BillboardGui children removed
- `_crowdModifiers` table flushed empty
- Idempotent: second `destroyAll` no-op without error

**Edge cases to cover**:
- destroyAll called with zero chests in pool → no error
- DraftOpen chest with empty candidates pool → graceful skip (no relic grant, chest still destroys)
- T9 ordering: `RoundLifecycle.destroyAll → RelicSystem.clearAll → MatchStateChanged Intermission broadcast` verified

**Estimated test count**: ~6 it() blocks

---

### 8-7 Relic story-001 — registry + 3 reference relics [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/relic-system/registry_reference_relics.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- `RelicRegistry.getRelicById(specId)` returns frozen spec table or nil
- 3 reference specs present: `TollBreaker` (Common, non-state), `Surge` (Rare, count mutation), `Wingspan` (Epic, radius multiplier)
- Each spec has typed fields: `{specId, tier, rarity, hookSet, durationTicks, privateStateInit}`
- Registry table frozen post-load — mutation attempts error or silently fail (immutable)
- Pillar 3 audit: no DataStoreService reference; no PlayerDataKey for relic state (audit-persistence.sh passes)
- Registry contents accessible via `RelicRegistry.getAll() -> {RelicSpec}` deterministic iteration order

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `getRelicById("nonexistent")` → nil (not error)
- Registry boot-time consistency — all specs have hook table or empty placeholder, no spec missing required fields

**Estimated test count**: ~6 it() blocks

---

### 8-8 Relic story-002 — grant atomic + slot state [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/relic-system/grant_atomic_slot_state.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- `RelicSystem.grant(crowdId, specId)` happy path: `#activeRelics < 4` → writes slot via `csm.addActiveRelic(crowdId, slot)` → fires `onAcquire(crowd, slot)` → broadcasts `CrowdRelicChanged`
- Slot ordering: first grant → slot 1; subsequent → 2, 3, 4
- Slot-cap defensive late-check: `#activeRelics >= 4` → reject silently (no slot write, no onAcquire fire, no broadcast)
- Atomic invariant: partial state never observable. Verified via test fixture that snapshots crowd record before/after grant call; intermediate state never read by external observer
- Grant for non-existent crowdId → silent reject (no error)
- Grant for non-existent specId → silent reject (registry lookup nil)
- 4-caller invariant: only RelicSystem appears as caller of `csm.addActiveRelic` (ADR-0004 Write-Access Matrix amendment for slot ops)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Grant same specId twice — both succeed if slots available; relic registry does not enforce uniqueness
- Grant after crowd Eliminated — silent reject via crowd state guard
- onAcquire hook errors (pcall guard) — slot still written, broadcast still fires

**Estimated test count**: ~8 it() blocks

---

### 8-9 Relic story-003 — hook dispatch Phase 2 [Logic + Integration]

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/relic-system/hook_dispatch_phase2.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- RelicSystem registers Phase 2 callback after Collision Phase 1 (verified via TickOrch _phases inspect)
- For each Active relic with `hookSet.onTick=true`, handler dispatched same tick
- Hook fire ordering across slots: ascending slotIndex 1 → 2 → 3 → 4
- Cross-phase visibility: count mutated by Surge onTick (Phase 2) is visible to Absorb Phase 3 same tick (verified via Phase 3 spy reading count)
- onAcquire fires synchronously inside `grant()` (Story 002 covers grant; this test verifies dispatch path)
- onExpire fires inside `clearAll()` / `removeActiveRelic()` (Story 008 covers removal path; this test verifies dispatch path)
- Absent hook (e.g., Surge has no onTick after first acquire) → no-op no error
- Forbidden: yield inside Phase 2 callback → orchestrator pcall isolation prevents crash, logs error

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Relic granted mid-tick → onTick fires next tick, not same tick
- Relic expired by clearAll then re-granted same tick → onAcquire fires for new instance, onExpire fired for old
- Multiple relics with same hook firing same tick — order deterministic (slotIndex)

**Estimated test count**: ~8 it() blocks

*Boundary-class test — covers ADR-0002 Phase 2 contract + cross-phase count visibility. Same class as BUG-001 root cause.*

---

### 8-10 Relic story-008 — clearAll + DC flush [Logic]

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/relic-system/clearall_dc_flush.spec.luau`

**What to test**:
- `clearAll()` fires at T9 AFTER `RoundLifecycle.destroyAll()` (ordering invariant verified via call trace)
- Per-slot onExpire fires in ascending slotIndex order
- `radiusMultiplier` reset to 1.0 post-clearAll
- `activeRelics` table empty post-clearAll
- `CrowdRelicChanged` NOT broadcast at T9 clearAll (clients learn state from MatchStateChanged Intermission)
- DC flush: `CrowdDestroyed` signal subscription fires onExpire per slot for the disconnecting player
- Idempotent: second clearAll → no-op (no double onExpire, no error)
- T9 ordering full chain: RoundLifecycle.destroyAll → RelicSystem.clearAll → MatchStateChanged Intermission broadcast (3-step locked order)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- clearAll called with zero active relics → no error, no onExpire fired
- DC mid-Active with 4 relics — all 4 onExpire fire in order; CSM record still destroyed by CSM's own PlayerRemoving handler (independent)
- Eliminated then DC race — onExpire fires once (idempotency guard tracks first-fire)

**Estimated test count**: ~6 it() blocks

---

**Pre-merge checklist**:

### 8-12 Relic story-004 — Surge count relic [Logic + Integration]

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/relic-system/surge_count_relic.spec.luau`

**Formula** (from relic GDD §G Surge):
- Surge onAcquire: `csm.updateCount(crowdId, +40, "Relic")`

**What to test**:
- Grant Surge → csm.updateCount called exactly once with delta=+40 and source="Relic"
- CSM clamps `[1, 300]` — pre-grant count=270 + Surge=40 → post=300 (clamped, not 310)
- GraceWindow up-delta: pre-grant count=0 GraceWindow → +40 → CSM transitions Active (up-delta allowed)
- GraceWindow down-delta: down-deltas rejected by CSM write guard (verified via CSM spy logging deltaSource="Relic" with negative delta = no-op)
- Surge hookSet.onTick = false → no further +40 on subsequent ticks (one-shot at acquire only)
- 4-caller invariant: "Relic" appears as deltaSource on updateCount; not "Absorb" or "Chest"

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Surge granted at count=300 (clamp max) → +40 → no-op (clamp)
- Surge granted to crowd Eliminated → grant guard rejects upstream; updateCount never called
- Two Surge grants stack? — per GDD §G Surge has no stacking guard at relic level; both grants succeed and both fire updateCount (CSM clamp absorbs overflow)

**Estimated test count**: ~8 it() blocks

*Boundary-class test — covers ADR-0004 CSM Authority 4-caller rule. Same class as BUG-001 (silent integration gap).*

## Manual QA Checklist

### 8-1 Spawn + prompt — Studio walkthrough

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server, single player.
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer (self) at story close.
**Evidence to capture**: screenshot of prompt visible at distance + console log of `ChestSystem.createAll` summary line.

Checklist:
- [ ] Place tagged `ChestT1` Part in Workspace
- [ ] Start Studio Local Server
- [ ] Walk character within prompt distance
- [ ] Prompt appears with correct ObjectText + ActionText
- [ ] Walk past distance → prompt hides
- [ ] Round end → prompt removed via destroyAll

### 8-5 Atomic claim Phase 4 — Studio 2-player

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server, 2 players.
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer.
**Evidence to capture**: screenshot or video of two players colliding at same chest + console log showing exactly one updateCount with deltaSource="Chest".

Checklist:
- [ ] Both clients spawn near same chest
- [ ] Hold E simultaneously
- [ ] Exactly one player loses follower count (toll deducted)
- [ ] Loser sees no error; no toll deducted from loser
- [ ] Console log shows updateCount fired once

### 8-9 + 8-12 Surge cross-phase visibility — Studio 2-player

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server, 2 players, fixture grant.
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer.
**Evidence to capture**: console log + nameplate observation.

Checklist:
- [ ] Fixture: force-grant Surge to P1 at count=100
- [ ] P1 count jumps to 140 next tick (onAcquire +40)
- [ ] P2 sees P1's count update via CRS broadcast
- [ ] No Surge re-fire on subsequent ticks (onAcquire only, not onTick)

### 8-17 Draft remotes timeout — Studio

**Verification method**: Studio Local Server, single player.
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer.
**Evidence to capture**: console log of DraftTimeout fire + auto-pick selection.

Checklist:
- [ ] Trigger chest, receive DraftOpened
- [ ] Wait 10+ seconds
- [ ] Server fires DraftTimeout
- [ ] Server auto-picks first candidate from roll
- [ ] CrowdRelicChanged broadcasts

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint (delta vs Sprint 7 smoke checklist):

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (unchanged)
2. Server boot order includes ChestSystem + RelicSystem (after AbsorbSystem; before CollisionResolver)
3. Round Active → 9 chests visible (6 T1 + 3 T2) tagged via CollectionService
4. Walk to chest → ProximityPrompt visible at distance ≤ `CHEST_PROMPT_DISTANCE`
5. Hold E → toll deducts from CSM count; chest disappears; ChestPeelOff visible visual feedback
6. Single chest open per player per round — 2nd chest attempt rejected silently
7. Surge relic granted (via fixture or first chest draft) → CSM count grows +40 next tick
8. Round end → all chests cleared; relic state flushed; no orphan prompts
9. DC mid-Active with relics → onExpire fires for owning player; other player crowds unaffected
10. Existing Sprint 7 critical paths (1-39) still pass — no regressions
11. `selene src/` clean post-stub deletion (8-11)
12. `bash tools/audit-asset-ids.sh` clean
13. `bash tools/audit-persistence.sh` clean — relic state Pillar 3 audit passes

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check`. Update `tests/smoke/critical-paths.md` post-impl per Sprint 8 retrospective.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| 8-5 | Two-player chest contention feels fair (no observable lag spike, loser doesn't feel cheated) | 1 | experienced (self + collaborator) |
| 8-12 | Surge +40 feels meaningful at low count, absorbed at high count | 1 | experienced |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes written to `production/playtests/sprint-8-[date].md` (FIRST entry — gate Production→Polish requires this dir to exist with ≥3 sessions before next gate retry). Reviewed by gameplay-programmer (self).

Sprint 8 establishes `production/playtests/` template via 8-5 + 8-12 sessions — laying groundwork for Sprint 10 Vertical Slice playtest cycle.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (BLOCKING per coding-standards.md)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for Visual/Feel and UI stories (none this sprint)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (full headless TestEZ suite passes — target ~990+ after Sprint 8 close)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] `selene src/` + audit scripts clean per commit
- [ ] sprint-status.yaml entry updated by `/story-done`

---

## Notes

- **4 boundary-class tests required** (8-5, 8-9, 8-10, 8-12): each crosses ADR-0002 Phase ordering or ADR-0004 CSM Authority. These are the BUG-001-regression-class tests. Do not skip.
- Sprint 7 closed without playtest infrastructure — Sprint 8 introduces `production/playtests/` via 8-5 + 8-12 sessions. Pre-emptive close of Polish gate blocker #2.
- `/qa-plan` ran BEFORE implementation — counter-pattern to Sprint 6 (where /qa-plan ran retroactively after BUG-001 surfaced). Sprint 7 retrospective lesson applied.
- ADR-0004 amendment for `addActiveRelic`/`removeActiveRelic` slot ops is referenced in Story 8-8 — verify ADR text covers this or amend pre-impl via `/architecture-decision`.
- 4th and 5th carry-forwards (8-13, 8-14) are at risk of perpetual slip. If they ship Sprint 8, retrospective should diagnose what changed; if they slip again, promote to must-have Sprint 9.

QA Plan: COMPLETE. Ready for implementation start with 8-1.
